title: Sakura Client
description: My personal clientside modpack with basic optimization and cosmetic mods and custom shader configs
body:
Just my personal clientside modpack, I figured I would upload it incase anyone wanted to use it too. It has some cosmetic and optimization mods, as well as resource packs and shaders.

Don't forget to enable the shaders you want, there are a few to choose from (Comp r5.6.1 is the one I use currently) and import the config for them in case they have not applied automatically. I spent hours configuring the two complementary versions so hope you like it! MakeUp Ultrafast has some small config changes but is meant to be a shader for lower end systems.

Also don't forget to enable/disable the resource packs you want if they are not already.

Essential doubles as a zoom mod, but you may have to set up a keybind for it.
If you use essentrial to play with others you may need to manually update it, if it is out of date.

Hope you enjoy!

**NOTE:** _I tried to include as many versions as possible but because of a combination of how long it took to make versions and mod incompatibilities, I do not have every version possible, as well as multiple mods not existing prior to 1.20_
